tasks.title: Workflow Reconciliation And Consistency Follow-up
scope: Record T006 attempt 1 review_rejected honestly before code edits.
Fix rollback/finalizer behavior so failed rollback requests cannot later finalize and delete active users.
Fix account deletion finalizer cleanup so post comment history subcollections are deleted like event comment history.
Run required local verification without commit, stage, push, PR, deploy, or unit-test/TDD expansion.
nonScope: No commit, stage, push, PR, CI watch, merge, local main sync, deploy, or production rules/functions deployment.
No unit tests or TDD for v1 unless explicitly reauthorized after BLOCKED.
No broad account deletion redesign or unrelated cleanup.
engineerInstructions: Attempt 2 starts from Reviewer rejection; do not revert unrelated worktree changes.
Keep fixes minimal and inside owned files.
Do not record review_passed or completed without Reviewer decision.
Report command exit codes and residual risks.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T006.2.1: Attempt 1 review_rejected and attempt 2 state are recorded in tasks.md, status.json, and handoff.md before code edits.
AC-T006.2.2: Side-effect rollback prevents failed requests from being selected or finalized later.
AC-T006.2.3: Account deletion cleanup deletes post comment history subcollections before deleting post comments.
AC-T006.2.4: Required local verification is rerun within the authorization boundary.

lastRun.summary: Changed files linted successfully; React settings warning only.

verification.expectedSignal: exit 0 with no changed-file type errors

lastRun.summary: Changed-file type check reported no errors.
9 status files valid and synced after attempt 2 evidence write.

evidence.engineerReport: Attempt 2 recorded T006 attempt 1 review_rejected first, then fixed both Reviewer-blocking defects. Rollback now removes scheduledFor, sets finalizationBlocked=true and failureStage=request_side_effects, and finalizer eligibility requires pending/finalizing or failed with finalizeStartedAt and no finalizationBlocked marker. Finalizer failed retries remain possible only for failures that reached finalization. Post deletion now uses the same comments-with-history cleanup helper as event deletion in both repo/server and functions/index.js.
evidence.reviewerReport: review_passed: T006 attempt 2 resolves the prior rollback/finalizer eligibility bug and post comment history cleanup gap. Workflow state records attempt 1 rejection and attempt 2 engineer_done without fake PASS/completed state. Fresh lint, changed-file type check, workflow check, and syntax checks passed.
commandOutputSummary: npm run lint:changed: exit 0; React settings warning only.
npm run type-check:changed: exit 0; No type errors in changed files.
npm run workflow:check: exit 0; 9 status files valid and synced after attempt 2 evidence write.
node --check functions/index.js: exit 0.
node --check src/repo/server/account-deletion-server-repo.js: exit 0.
changedFilesSummary: src/repo/server/account-deletion-server-repo.js: rollback request no longer remains due/finalizable; finalizer skips non-finalizable failed requests; post comments delete history subcollections.
functions/index.js: finalizer mirrors non-finalizable failed-request guard and post comment history cleanup.
specs/account-deletion/status.json: T006 attempt 1 rejection and attempt 2 engineer_done evidence recorded.

tasks.title: Firestore Comments Author Index Follow-up
scope: Add the missing comments.authorUid collection-group ASC field override required by the account deletion comments query.
Add a focused static Vitest regression test that parses firestore.indexes.json as JSON.
Record the production incident, root cause, T007 authorization boundary, and pending index deploy state.
nonScope: No API route error handling, OAuth/provider selection, frontend UI/toast, repo query shape, rules, functions, migration, data retention/finalizer, dependency, push, PR, CI watch, merge, local main sync, or Firebase deploy changes.
Do not modify unrelated untracked specs/account-deletion-index-error scratch files.
engineerInstructions: Use TDD: write the static index test first and capture the expected failing signal before changing firestore.indexes.json.
Continue attempt 1 by moving the static regression test from tests/unit/config to tests/server/firestore.
Preserve existing composite indexes and field overrides.
Do not modify tsconfig.json, eslint.config.mjs, or vitest setup/config files.
Stop before any Firebase index/rules/functions deploy.
Stop if passing verification requires modifying files outside the owned file list.
acceptanceCriteria: AC-T007.1: firestore.indexes.json remains valid JSON and includes comments.authorUid with ASCENDING COLLECTION_GROUP field override.
AC-T007.2: Existing indexes and field overrides are preserved.
AC-T007.3: Regression test parses JSON semantically instead of grepping strings.
AC-T007.4: Workflow state records the production incident/root cause, pre-closeout pending deploy state, and release closeout index deploy evidence.
AC-T007.5: Required verification passes or the blocker is recorded with evidence.

evidence.engineerReport: Continued T007 attempt 1 by moving the static Firestore index regression test from tests/unit/config to tests/server/firestore and adding JSDoc. The original lint blocker is resolved. The second blocker was resolved by using the existing server/firestore setup contract: run the focused Vitest command with FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST and FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST set. Reviewer rejected once only because workflow state incorrectly recorded commit=false despite user commit authorization. Authorization state is corrected to commit=true; no commit or Firebase deploy was performed by the Engineer.
evidence.reviewerReport: Attempt 1 review_rejected: workflow state recorded commit=false, but user explicitly authorized commit. No implementation defect was reported. Attempt 2 review_passed: no findings; index/test implementation is correct, workflow authorization boundary is corrected, and Firestore index deploy remained pending until explicit release closeout authorization.

evidence: T006 Firestore rules/functions deploy evidence is historical. T007 adds a Firestore index config change; only firestore:indexes was deployed during this release closeout.

evidence.summary: Firebase CLI deployed indexes in firestore.indexes.json successfully for the (default) Firestore database; Firestore rules were compiled only and no rules/functions deploy was run.

incidents.summary: tasks.md claimed T001-T005 completed while status.json only carried T001 detail and no reviewerDecision. T006 reconciles state to engineer_done/in_progress without Reviewer PASS.

Manual account deletion request for Crawler Mr. failed with Firestore failed-precondition missing COLLECTION_GROUP_ASC index for comments.authorUid. T007 added the local config fix and regression test, then Firebase firestore:indexes deploy succeeded for the deployed fix commit. Browser account deletion was not re-run after deploy because it is destructive.
